description_long: A small brown frog is perched on a large, vibrant green leaf, which is part of a cluster of three broad, veined leaves with long, slender stems. The frog has a textured, bumpy skin with darker brown markings and is positioned as if alert, facing outward. The leaves are glossy and slightly curved, with visible veins and natural imperfections, suggesting a realistic plant structure. Tiny specks, possibly representing water droplets or debris, are scattered around the leaves, adding to the naturalistic setting. The stems are thin and dark green, supporting the leaves at different angles. The overall composition evokes a scene from a lush, humid environment, such as a tropical garden or urban park.
description: A small brown frog sits on a large, glossy green leaf among a cluster of broad, veined leaves with slender stems and scattered specks.
description_view_0: The frog is seen from above, sitting on the rightmost leaf, with all three leaves and their stems clearly visible.
description_view_1: The frog is viewed from the side, showing its profile and the curvature of the leaf beneath it, with the other leaves receding into the background.
description_view_2: The frog is seen from behind, with its back and the tops of the leaves most prominent, and the stems extending away.
description_view_3: The frog is viewed from the opposite side, showing its other profile and the overlapping leaves, with stems visible below.
